title: Perralderiopsis discoidea
taxonomy: Perralderiopsis discoidea is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Perralderiopsis which is part of the Fabaceae family. Within the Fabaceae family, it is categorized as a legume due to its fruit and seed characteristics. The species is further classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae, which includes many other legumes. This classification places Perralderiopsis discoidea among the diverse and widespread legume family.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage.
